blended.narrative: Stoneham is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.1 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,262 ft. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Thursday: 8" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
